name: FctsIdsWorkCompClmLnDsalwCntBal

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT clmLnDsalw.CLM_ID AS TRGT_CLM_ID, clmLnDsalw.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO AS TRGT_CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, clmLnDsalw.CLM_LN_DSALW_TYP_CD AS TRGT_CLM_LN_DSALW_TYP_CD, clmLnDsalw.SRC_SYS_CD AS TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD, bal.CLM_ID, bal.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, bal.CLM_LN_DSALW_TYP_CD, bal.SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_WorkCompOwner}.WORK_COMPNSTN_CLM_LN_DSALW clmLnDsalw FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_WorkCompOwner}.B_WORK_COMPNSTN_CLM_LN_DSALW bal ON clmLnDsalw.SRC_SYS_CD = bal.SRC_SYS_CD AND clmLnDsalw.CLM_ID = bal.CLM_ID AND clmLnDsalw.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO = bal.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO AND clmLnDsalw.CLM_LN_DSALW_TYP_CD = bal.CLM_LN_DSALW_TYP_CD WHERE clmLnDsalw.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle};

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.S07_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmLnDsalwCntBalResearch; SELECT TRGT_CLM_ID, TRGT_CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, TRGT_CLM_LN_DSALW_TYP_CD, TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, CLM_LN_DSALW_TYP_CD, SRC_SYS_CD INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.S07_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmLnDsalwCntBalResearch FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.S07_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmLnDsalwCntBal WHERE (CLM_ID IS NULL OR TRGT_CLM_ID IS NULL OR CLM_LN_SEQ_NO IS NULL OR TRGT_CLM_LN_SEQ_NO IS NULL OR SRC_SYS_CD IS NULL OR TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD IS NULL OR CLM_LN_DSALW_TYP_CD IS NULL OR TRGT_CLM_LN_DSALW_TYP_CD IS NULL); DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.S07_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmLnDsalwCntBalNotify; SELECT 'ROW COUNT BALANCING FACETS - IDS WORKERS COMP CLM LN DSALW OUT OF TOLERANCE' as NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.S07_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmLnDsalwCntBalNotify FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) as rownum FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.S07_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmLnDsalwCntBal ) x WHERE x.rownum=1 AND '@{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd}'='OUT';
